product: SAP Cloud Integration (SAP Integration Suite) — OData API, Integration Content
service_root: <tenant url> + /api/v1; the API is implemented on the OData version 2 specification (d-envelope JSON with $format=json)

authentication.scheme: basic authentication (OAuth also supported); Authorization: Basic base64(user:password) on every request

csrf.fetch: before any modifying call (POST/PUT/DELETE): send a GET to the API with header X-CSRF-Token: Fetch; the response returns the token in the X-CSRF-Token header plus a session cookie in Set-Cookie
csrf.use: modifying requests carry the fetched X-CSRF-Token header AND the session cookie; the token is cached and reused (exactly one fetch across consecutive writes in one run)
csrf.reads: plain GET reads need no CSRF pre-flight

design_time.list_versions: GET /api/v1/IntegrationDesigntimeArtifacts?$format=json&$filter=Id%20eq%20'<Id>' — returns d.results with Id/Version/Name/PackageId; versions compare numerically per dotted segment (1.10.0 > 1.9.0)
design_time.update_draft: PUT /api/v1/IntegrationDesigntimeArtifacts(Id='<Id>',Version='active') with JSON body {"Name": ..., "ArtifactContent": base64 of the artifact bundle}
design_time.artifact_content: ArtifactContent is the base64-encoded binary bundle (zip); single-line base64, exact padding, byte-exact round trip
design_time.save_as_version: POST /api/v1/IntegrationDesigntimeArtifactSaveAsVersion?Id='<Id>'&SaveAsVersion='<version>' — query parameter values are single-quoted; 201 on success

deploy.action: POST /api/v1/DeployIntegrationDesigntimeArtifact?Id='<Id>'&Version='<version>' — single-quoted query parameters; responds 202 with the build task id as the response body
deploy.build_status: GET /api/v1/BuildAndDeployStatus(TaskId='<taskId>')?$format=json -> d.Status in DEPLOYING | SUCCESS | FAIL | FAIL_ON_LICENSE_ERROR (DEPLOYING is the only non-terminal value)
deploy.runtime_status: after build SUCCESS: GET /api/v1/IntegrationRuntimeArtifacts('<Id>')?$format=json -> d.Status; STARTING/STOPPING are intermediate, STARTED and ERROR are final
deploy.error_detail: GET /api/v1/IntegrationRuntimeArtifacts('<Id>')/ErrorInformation/$value returns the runtime error message in JSON format
deploy.polling: no sleeps: between non-terminal polls call the injected wait(seconds); at most max_polls status reads, then a deployment error naming the task id

conflict_rule: before uploading, the deployer lists existing versions; if any remote version is >= the target version it raises a version conflict naming the newer/equal remote version and performs ZERO modifying requests
error_document: non-2xx responses carry {"error": {"code", "message": {"lang", "value"}, vendor members such as innererror}}; code and message.value are decoded and the full error object is preserved verbatim; credentials never appear in errors

mock_fixture.tenant_url: loopback http://127.0.0.1:{port} standing in for the service-key url parameter
